summary: Iteration 36: Verified scroll-spy (IntersectionObserver auto-updates nav pills on scroll) and enhanced active section visibility (ring-2, shadow-xl, bg-primary tint on header). All features working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Click Services nav pill → Services pill gets bg-primary class (active state) - PASS
2. Services section gets ring-2 class (enhanced active styling) - PASS
3. Services section gets shadow-xl class (enhanced active styling) - PASS
4. Click Security nav pill → Security pill active, Services pill loses active state - PASS
5. Security section gets ring-2 and shadow-xl (active styling transfers) - PASS
6. Scroll-spy: Manually scroll to IPAM → IPAM pill auto-highlighted - PASS
7. Scroll-spy: Scroll up triggers Internal DNS pill to become active - PASS
8. Click IPAM pill → IPAM pill immediately active (not delayed) - PASS
9. IPAM section gets ring-2 and shadow-xl when active - PASS
10. Collapsed sections expand when clicking nav pill - PASS (scrollToSection sets collapsed=false)
11. Save functionality works - Shows 'Saved - All changes saved successfully' toast - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentQuestions.jsx: IntersectionObserver scroll-spy (lines 224-256) working correctly - uses rootMargin '-80px 0px -40% 0px' to track section nearest viewport top
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: isScrolling ref (line 221) prevents observer updates during programmatic scrolling (800ms debounce in setTimeout line 329)
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: scrollToSection (lines 322-331) immediately sets activeSection and expands collapsed sections before scroll animation
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: Active section styling (lines 814-819) applies ring-2, shadow-xl, border-primary, and bg-primary/[0.03] tint
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: Active section header styling (lines 826-830) applies bg-primary/[0.08] tint
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: Nav pill auto-scroll (lines 245-248) scrolls active pill into view when section becomes active
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scroll-spy and enhanced active section visibility verified. Key behaviors: (1) IntersectionObserver tracks which section is in viewport and auto-updates activeSection state, triggering nav pill highlight via bg-primary class. (2) Active sections get ring-2 ring-primary/40, shadow-xl shadow-primary/10, border-primary/50 styling. (3) Active section headers get bg-primary/[0.08] tint. (4) Clicking nav pill immediately sets activeSection (no delay) and scrollToSection expands collapsed sections. (5) isScrolling ref blocks observer updates for 800ms during programmatic scrolling to prevent jitter. Key selectors: [data-nav-section='SECTION_NAME'] for pills, [data-section-id='SECTION_NAME'] for sections, bg-primary class indicates active pill.

scroll_spy.debounce: isScrolling ref blocks updates for 800ms during programmatic scrolling
scroll_spy.auto_pill_scroll: Active pill auto-scrolls into view via scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest', inline: 'center' })

enhanced_active_section_visibility.section_card_styling: ring-2 ring-primary/40, shadow-xl shadow-primary/10, border-primary/50, bg-primary/[0.03] tint
